# Oden

> Oden is the Product Marketing Platform that deploys a synchronized team of specialized AI agents-Sales, Positioning, GTM, and Content-that work together to orchestrate your strategy and execution instantly.

Oden is the Product Marketing Platform that deploys a synchronized team of specialized AI agents-Sales, Positioning, GTM, and Content-that work together to orchestrate your strategy and execution instantly. The platform enables marketers to gather intelligence from internal data sources (sales call transcripts, competitor documentation, market research) and across the web, then use a team of AI agents to orchestrate PMM strategy and execution.

## Main Website

- [Oden Home](https://getoden.com/): The Product Marketing Platform that orchestrates strategy and execution with specialized AI agents
- [About](https://getoden.com/about): Meet Oden's leadership team and learn how we're building the Product Marketing Platform
- [Pricing](https://getoden.com/pricing): Pricing plans and credit-based pricing model for Oden
- [Sales Enablement Agent](https://getoden.com/agent/sales-enablement): AI agent to monitor competitors and update battle cards in real-time
- [Buyer Intel Agent](https://getoden.com/agent/buyer-intel): Analyze buyer needs, pain points, decision criteria, and purchase triggers-turning market research into actionable intelligence.
- [Competitor Intel Agent](https://getoden.com/agent/competitor-intel): Monitor competitor websites, pricing pages, feature updates, and market moves 24/7-so you're never caught off guard.
- [Content Agent](https://getoden.com/agent/content): Generate case studies, blog posts, one-pagers, and sales collateral-all on-brand, properly sourced, and ready to ship.
- [GTM Strategy Agent](https://getoden.com/agent/gtm-strategy): Plan launch sequences, coordinate cross-functional timelines, and keep everyone aligned on milestones that matter.
- [Positioning Agent](https://getoden.com/agent/positioning): Craft messaging frameworks, value propositions, and differentiation narratives that cut through the noise and resonate with your buyers.
- [Slack Integration](https://getoden.com/slack): Get AI-powered product marketing intelligence directly in Slack
- [Blog](https://getoden.com/blog): Product news, best practices, and in-depth comparison guides
- [Oden for Founding PMMs](https://getoden.com/founding-pmm): Specialized AI agents for founding PMMs to handle positioning and GTM.
- [Oden for Consultants](https://getoden.com/consultant): Scale your PMM consultancy with specialized AI agents.
- [Support](https://getoden.com/support): Get help with Oden, contact our team, or browse common questions.
- [Billing & Refund Policy](https://getoden.com/billing): Manage your subscription and understand Oden's billing and refund policies.
- [Privacy Policy](https://getoden.com/privacy): How Oden protects and handles your data.
- [Terms of Service](https://getoden.com/terms-of-service): Legal agreement for using Oden services.
- [Sub-processors](https://getoden.com/subprocessors): List of third-party vendors Oden uses to deliver services.

- [Why Battlecards Fail (And How PMMs Fix Them)](https://getoden.com/blog/why-battlecards-fail): Learn why sales ignores battlecards and how to build living battlecards that stay current. From staleness problems to continuous updates, here's how PMMs fix battlecard failures.
- [Yotpo vs Bazaarvoice vs PowerReviews vs Trustpilot - Comparison](https://getoden.com/blog/yotpo-vs-bazaarvoice-vs-powerreviews-vs-trustpilot): Comparing Yotpo, Bazaarvoice, PowerReviews and Trustpilot on ratings, cost, features and real customer feedback so you can pick the right reviews platform.

- [Win-Loss Analysis for Product Marketers](https://getoden.com/blog/win-loss-analysis-product-marketing): Learn how to build win-loss analysis as a continuous PMM workflow, not a consultant-led research project. From signal capture to messaging updates, here's how win-loss actually works in high-performing product marketing teams.
- [Why Product Marketing Has No System of Record](https://getoden.com/blog/why-product-marketing-has-no-system-of-record): We have forced Product Marketers to use filing cabinets for a job that requires a nerve center. Here’s why your 'single source of truth' is a lie.
- [The PMM Context Audit](https://getoden.com/blog/the-pmm-context-audit): Most PMM teams aren't suffering from a lack of strategy. They are suffering from latency. Here are the 7 hard questions I use to prove it.

## Tools

- [Templates](https://getoden.com/tools/templates): Ready-to-use product marketing templates for win/loss analysis, battle cards, and more
- [Battle Card Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/battle-card-template): Download a battle card template to benchmark competitors, crystallize differentiators, and arm sales with crisp objection responses.
- [Win/Loss Analysis Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/win-loss-analysis-template): Download our free Win/Loss Analysis template to systematically track competitive deals, understand why you win or lose, and turn insights into actionable improvements
- [Competitive Intelligence Tracker Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/competitive-intelligence-tracker): Download our free Competitive Intelligence Tracker to monitor competitor moves, product updates, pricing changes, and market positioning in real-time.
- [Product Launch Checklist Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/product-launch-checklist-template): Download our free Product Launch Checklist template to plan and execute comprehensive GTM launches covering messaging, assets, enablement, and post-launch tracking.
- [Go-To-Market Plan Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/gtm-plan-template): Download our free Go-To-Market Plan template to create comprehensive go-to-market strategies covering strategic overview, quarterly roadmaps, channel strategy, KPIs, and resource planning.
- [GTM Roadmap Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/gtm-roadmap-template): Download our free GTM Roadmap template to map launches, campaigns, enablement, dependencies, owners, and milestones across your go-to-market calendar.
- [Messaging Framework Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/messaging-framework-template): Download our free Messaging Framework template to define positioning, value props, proof points, and persona-specific messaging your whole GTM team can actually use.
- [Customer Story Template](https://getoden.com/tools/templates/customer-story-template): Download our free Customer Story template to capture compelling case studies with a proven structure that turns customer wins into pipeline-driving proof points.
- [Product Marketing Job Board](https://getoden.com/tools/product-marketing-job-board): Curated, hand-verified Product Marketing Manager openings with quick filters for location, work setting, and experience level
- [Product Marketing Glossary](https://getoden.com/tools/product-marketing-glossary): A comprehensive glossary of product marketing terms, from battle cards to win/loss analysis
- [Product Marketing Events](https://getoden.com/tools/product-marketing-events): Discover upcoming product marketing conferences, meetups, and summits.
